# Security Policy

## Project version statuts

The security updates are right now only available for the 1.4.x snapshots. Skudar and I are working on the 2.0.0 version of the Discord bot, but the snapshot for the 1.4.0
that is 1.4.x snapshot is the latest somewhat stable version of the bot. The developpement of the bot's 2.0.0 is slow,
so the 1.4.x snapshot will continue to be supported for security updates for as long as the 2.0.0 is not released.
That snapshot is also receiving some bug fixes and performences enchancement to make sure it continues to function,
and preparations for the 2.0.0 database transition.

## Supported Versions

The version currently being supported with security updates.

| Version         | Supported          |
|-----------------| ------------------ |
| 1.4.x snapshots | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please report vulnerabilities via github issues, with the prefix starting with `SECURITY:`. If possible, please submit a PR for the fix.
